item.title: Download Pianoteq Pro 9.1.2
item.description: Pianoteq 8 is a virtual instrument from Modartt, which uses physical modeling to recreate the sound and behavior of pianos and other instruments. Unlike sampled instruments, it takes up very little disk space, while delivering high realism and a wide dynamic range. Dual Polarity: An advanced physics engine simulates the vibration of strings in multiple directions, resulting in a more complex and realistic sound, especially in the low range. item.title: Download Sante DICOM Worklist Server 2.5
item.description: Sante DICOM Worklist Server (MWL Server) is an automated program that can receive via HL7 communication messages the patient's demographic information and examination schedules stored in the HIS/RIS system. Hospital Information System/Radiology Information System) and transfer them to any modality/medical scanner via DICOM communication protocol (C-FIND). The program provides automatic, error-free and reliable transfer of HL7 information (HIS/RIS) nodes to DICOM (medical scanner) nodes...

item.title: Download Sonoris Parallel Equalizer 1.2.1
item.description: Sonoris Parallel Equalizer is a minimal phase parametric equalizer in VST, VST3, AU and AAX formats for Windows and Mac. The plugin is suitable for mixing and especially mastering. It has fixed filter types on each band and bands 2 to 6 are connected in parallel. The filters are built in a feedback/feedback manner to provide cutting and boosting capabilities, just like in an analog graphic equalizer. Bands 3 to 5 are constant Q bells and 2 and 6 are shelves. Bands 1 and 7 are low/high...

item.title: Download Sonoris DDP Creator 6.0.1
item.description: Sonoris DDP Creator is a standalone cross-platform DDP editing application compatible with almost any DAW software on the market. DDP Creator allows you to assemble professional RedBook-compatible audio CDs and supports import and export of DDP 2.00 images and Cue Sheet (cue) files. It also allows you to burn and rip audio CDs and send images using FTP.
